description: A feature spec template for adding or changing a command-line tool or command: command surface, arguments and options, exit codes, stdout/stderr behavior, machine-readable output, non-interactive use, platform compatibility, error handling, and tests.

variables.name: commandName
variables.description: Name of the command the spec covers (e.g. "mycli").

variables.name: actor
variables.description: Primary user of the command (a role, e.g. "developer").

examples: specbridge template apply cli-tool --name my-tool --var commandName=mycli
